headline: UnitedHealth CFO sends stark warning after earnings
summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) beat Wall Street's numbers on July 16, 2026, but its chief financial officer spent the earnings call making sure nobody mistook that result for a solved cost problem. The company beat earnings estimates by roughly 30%, and management raised full-year guidance well past ...
